TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de, title = Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de} }

S.FORM: == Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de šľäśĖĮŤė≠ÁĎ™Ś∑īŚĺ∑ == Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de "W-e-du kamu:ōßō≥ŔĄōßŔÖ ōĘō®ōßōĮ‚Äé, sumad han:IslńĀm ńÄbńĀd‚Äé", u Pa-ci-se-tan a tukay, kitidaan nu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de a tukayan. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de itida i Pa-ci-se-tan wali amis a Puo-te'-wa-buyu'an, talakaw limsipsep kun-ce, u kalasengesengetan ku caledes nu demiadan. itini i likisi, ina kitidaan u sakatayda i Pan-pu atu Kay-puo-e-pu-se-tu a sacumud nu ziwziluan, ina Ma-ke-la sacumud u sakatayda tu tusaay a kitidaan nu cacumudan. :ōßō≥ŔĄōßŔÖ ōĘō®ōßōĮ‚Äé,ŤĹČŚĮę:IslńĀm ńÄbńĀd‚Äé) . Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de nikayzuan itida i caysiwnemsep mihcaan, miliyun tun aw tukay nu Ke'-la-ce. aydaay nu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de nu malisimetay a kanatalan, saan u Pa-ci-se-tan samalahatay a kanatal, masausiay nu Gamma+ a kanatalan nu tukay. nika namaka tucay a secian, Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de kinapina debungan nu makatalay a tademaw. itini i tusepseppic mihcaan enem a bulad tusa a demiadan a Dan-may muenengay i Pa-ci-se-tan ta-se-kun mabakuhac atu nuydaan a mihcaan tu siwa a bulad tusa a bataan a demiadan a Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de a hutiluan mabakuhac. Gamma . Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de itida i tusepcaycay mihcaan idaw ku tusa a lasubu a wang nu tademawan, atu mitepalay a tukay u La-wa-e-pin pulungen nu heni ku tademaw malakuuyt ku siplimsep a wang nu tademawan, mala sakatulu nu kanatal a tukayan nu tademawan. nu nikapatidengan tina tukayan idaw tu ku namaka cuwacuwaay a tademawan, ina Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de mala Pa-ci-se-tan itini i kitakidan atu talakaway nu tukayan a tukayan. malakitakid nu tukay, Pa-ci-se-tan sihu, Pa-ci-se-tan-cuntung hu ci "Aiwan-e-Sadr" itida a mueneng. Pa-ci-se-tan kakiningan tu paya itida tu. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de u sayadahay nu sakayhekal nu tahudan, tapang atu mikuliay i siehu a lalitemuhan nu kitidaan. (Aiwan-e-Sadr) . Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de a tukay mibuwahay nu wi-yen-huy "CDA" misuayaw tu tukay ni patidengan tu mamikuwan a tademaw. Nan-ya satabakiay a Cin-cen-biyu, sakasepat nu satabakiay nu kitakidan a Cin-cen-se Fea-sa-e-Cin-cen-se itida ku nipatideng i Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de idaw ku tabakiay nu cacudadan sabaw enem ku palutatengaan. pasu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de nu kaygung tabakiay a cacudadan "AU", Cen-na tabakiay a cacudadan "QAU" atu Pa-ci-se-tan kuo-li-ke-ci-tabakiay a cacudadan "NUST", duma u A-la-ma.Yi-ke'-e-kay-fan tabakiay a cacudadan "ALOU" sipakayda nu namiccudaday a tademaw u sakasepat nu kitakidan a tabakiay nu cacudadan. (CDA) (AU),ÁúüÁīćŚ§ßŚ≠ł(QAU) (NUST),ŚÖ∂šł≠ťėŅśčČÁĎ™¬∑šľäŚÖčŚ∑īÁąĺťĖčśĒĺŚ§ßŚ≠ł(AIOU) . tapang nu cudad Ť©ěśļź "Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de" ""Islamabad"" cacay nu sasulitan namaka "Islam" atu "abad", imi u Yi-se-lan a tukay. "Islam" u A-la-puo kamu masacacayay han u Yi-se-lan-cyaw nu kiwkayan, "-abad" namaka Puo-se-kamu tu niyadu' a pinganganan, imi u "sitademaway nu aenengan a kitidaan" hatu "tukay". "šľäśĖĮŤė≠ÁĎ™Ś∑īŚĺ∑"("Islamabad")šłÄŤ©ěšĺÜŤá™"Islam"ŚíĆ"abad",ŚÖ∂śĄŹÁāļ"šľäśĖĮŤė≠ÁöĄŚüéŚłā"."Islam" ,"-abad" ". Likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de tukay atu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de aenengan i Puo-te'-wa-e pabaw nu buyu'an a nu liwan a kitidaaan saan u Ya-cuo sayaway a Tadema nu liwan a kitidaan. itida i buyu'an maadih ku nu sumamaday nu ba'tuan a liwan nu kitidaan taneng talaayaw mikilim tu lima a bataan nu wang a mihcaan, itida i Suo-an-sawacan makatepa tu liwan nu kitidaan u namaka pin-ci a naayaway nu tademaw anipisaculiculilan ni patahekalan tu sasasiwmian. Pa-ci-se-tan caysiwsippic mihcaan a patideng tina kanatalan, tukay itida i lalabu nu kanatal nu timulan a minatu nu tukay Ke'-la-ce. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de yadah ku mahiniay sakay tukay a nipatidengan tu mahiniay. nu ayawan a cuntun nu Pa-ci-se-tan ci A-yiw-pu.Han mangalay misakapah tu nikaudip, nika dayday nu Pa-ci-se-tan sakay sakaudip itida milingling tu Ke-la-ce nu nikudanay a binacadan nu kakitidaan. kacaledesan tawya ku Ke'-la-ce, sakatimul tu micapi tu A-la-puo bayuan, sakay hitayan caay kaw matatungusa. misuayaw tu Pa-ci-se-tan kapah patideng tu niyaniyadu'an tu sakalalitemuhan a tukayan. sisa kinapina misimsim ku syahu tu sapilimadaw katukuh i caysiwlimsiw mihcaan tusa a bulad kya mapatideng i Puo-te'-wa-e buyuan patideng i wali amis a kitidaan nu La-wa-e-pin-ti. pangangan han "Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de". ". caysiwpicsep mihcaan kakitidaan nu lalaan makaala tu siwseppic pin-fan-kun-li, aydaay namin a sangan, idaw ku dayday nu Yi-se-lan. makakenih tu niyadu', kakakulian, sasasiwbayan, aenengan nu tapang, kakakulian tu ba'ketay, langlangdawan nu kilakilangan nikakenihan. kakulian nu sihu timulan u sakay nutawan nu kanatalan a kitidaan, nutipan u ahebalay nu hulican a dadan, tepal han u kapulungan a sakakawawan, ilabu idaw ku gingku, pahusuay, pahusuay tu tilibi, dansinkiwk. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de u kasengesengedan cacaledesan nu demiadan "Cwa".i enemay nu buladan ku sacaledesay, hucunu demiadan makaala tu 38ÔĺüC (100.4ÔĺüF).kasengetan nu demiad i pituay a bulad, tabaki ku nikahetik nu udad, labii han idaw ku kelekelengan a nikaudadan, hakiya idaw ku balat atu tabaki nu udadan. sasapi'ay nu udadan i cacayay nu bulad.
S.PHON: == ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô ****** == ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô "w-…ô-du kamu:***** *****, sumad ńßan:isr~…ĺ*m *b*d*", u pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan a tukaj, kitidaan nu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô a tukajan. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô itida i pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan war~…ĺi amis a puo-t…ô Ē~ °-wa-buju Ē~ °an, tar~…ĺakaw r~…ĺimsips…ôp kun- ¶…ô, u kar~…ĺas…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôtan ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs nu d…ômiadan. itini i r~…ĺikisi, ina kitidaan u sakatajda i pan-pu atu kaj-puo-…ô-pu-s…ô-tu a sa ¶umud nu ziwzir~…ĺuan, ina ma-k…ô-r~…ĺa sa ¶umud u sakatajda tu tusaaj a kitidaan nu ¶a ¶umudan. :***** *****,**:isr~…ĺ*m *b*d*) . ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô nikajzuan itida i ¶ajsiwn…ôms…ôp mińß ¶aan, mir~…ĺijun tun aw tukaj nu k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô. ajdaaj nu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô nu mar~…ĺisim…ôtaj a kanatar~…ĺan, saan u pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan samar~…ĺańßataj a kanatar~…ĺ, masausiaj nu gamma+ a kanatar~…ĺan nu tukaj. nika namaka tu ¶aj a s…ô ¶ian, ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô kinapina d…ôbuŇčan nu makatar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. itini i tus…ôps…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiadan a dan-maj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan ta-s…ô-kun mabakuńßa ¶ atu nujdaan a mińß ¶aan tu siwa a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan a d…ômiadan a ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô a ńßutir~…ĺuan mabakuńßa ¶. gamma . ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô itida i tus…ôp ¶aj ¶aj mińß ¶aan idaw ku tusa a r~…ĺasubu a waŇč nu tad…ômawan, atu mit…ôpar~…ĺaj a tukaj u r~…ĺa-wa-…ô-pin pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn nu ńß…ôni ku tad…ômaw mar~…ĺakuujt ku sipr~…ĺims…ôp a waŇč nu tad…ômawan, mar~…ĺa sakatur~…ĺu nu kanatar~…ĺ a tukajan nu tad…ômawan. nu nikapatid…ôŇčan tina tukajan idaw tu ku namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a tad…ômawan, ina ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô mar~…ĺa pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan itini i kitakidan atu tar~…ĺakawaj nu tukajan a tukajan. mar~…ĺakitakid nu tukaj, pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan sińßu, pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan- ¶untuŇč ńßu ¶i "aiwan-…ô-sadr" itida a mu…ôn…ôŇč. pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan kakiniŇčan tu paja itida tu. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô u sajadańßaj nu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tańßudan, tapaŇč atu mikur~…ĺiaj i si…ôńßu a r~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan nu kitidaan. (aiwan-…ô-sadr) . ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô a tukaj mibuwańßaj nu wi-j…ôn-ńßuj " ¶da" misuajaw tu tukaj ni patid…ôŇčan tu mamikuwan a tad…ômaw. nan-ja satabakiaj a ¶in- ¶…ôn-biju, sakas…ôpat nu satabakiaj nu kitakidan a ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô f…ôa-sa-…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô itida ku nipatid…ôŇč i ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô idaw ku tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan sabaw …ôn…ôm ku par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan. pasu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô nu kajguŇč tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "au", ¶…ôn-na tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "*au" atu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan kuo-r~…ĺi-k…ô- ¶i-tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "nust", duma u a-r~…ĺa-ma.ji-k…ô Ē~ °-…ô-kaj-fan tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "ar~…ĺou" sipakajda nu nami ¶ ¶udadaj a tad…ômaw u sakas…ôpat nu kitakidan a tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan. ( ¶da) (au),****(*au) (nust),**************(aiou) . tapaŇč nu ¶udad ** "ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô" ""isr~…ĺamabad"" ¶a ¶aj nu sasur~…ĺitan namaka "isr~…ĺam" atu "abad", imi u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan a tukaj. "isr~…ĺam" u a-r~…ĺa-puo kamu masa ¶a ¶ajaj ńßan u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw nu kiwkajan, "-abad" namaka puo-s…ô-kamu tu nijadu Ē~ ° a piŇčaŇčanan, imi u "sitad…ômawaj nu a…ôn…ôŇčan a kitidaan" ńßatu "tukaj". "******"("isr~…ĺamabad")****"isr~…ĺam"*"abad",***"******"."isr~…ĺam" ,"-abad" ". r~…ĺikisi ** ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô tukaj atu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô a…ôn…ôŇčan i puo-t…ô Ē~ °-wa-…ô pabaw nu buju Ē~ °an a nu r~…ĺiwan a kitidaaan saan u ja- ¶uo sajawaj a tad…ôma nu r~…ĺiwan a kitidaan. itida i buju Ē~ °an maadińß ku nu sumamadaj nu ba Ē~ °tuan a r~…ĺiwan nu kitidaan tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺaajaw mikir~…ĺim tu r~…ĺima a bataan nu waŇč a mińß ¶aan, itida i suo-an-sawa ¶an makat…ôpa tu r~…ĺiwan nu kitidaan u namaka pin- ¶i a naajawaj nu tad…ômaw anipisa ¶ur~…ĺi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan ni patańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sasasiwmian. pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan a patid…ôŇč tina kanatar~…ĺan, tukaj itida i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ nu timur~…ĺan a minatu nu tukaj k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô jadańß ku mańßiniaj sakaj tukaj a nipatid…ôŇčan tu mańßiniaj. nu ajawan a ¶untun nu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan ¶i a-jiw-pu.ńßan maŇčar~…ĺaj misakapańß tu nikaudip, nika dajdaj nu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan sakaj sakaudip itida mir~…ĺiŇčr~…ĺiŇč tu k…ô-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô nu nikudanaj a bina ¶adan nu kakitidaan. ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan tawja ku k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô, sakatimur~…ĺ tu mi ¶api tu a-r~…ĺa-puo bajuan, sakaj ńßitajan ¶aaj kaw matatuŇčusa. misuajaw tu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan kapańß patid…ôŇč tu nijanijadu Ē~ °an tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a tukajan. sisa kinapina misimsim ku sjańßu tu sapir~…ĺimadaw katukuńß i ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimsiw mińß ¶aan tusa a bur~…ĺad kja mapatid…ôŇč i puo-t…ô Ē~ °-wa-…ô bujuan patid…ôŇč i war~…ĺi amis a kitidaan nu r~…ĺa-wa-…ô-pin-ti. paŇčaŇčan ńßan "ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô". ". ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan kakitidaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan makaar~…ĺa tu siws…ôppi ¶ pin-fan-kun-r~…ĺi, ajdaaj namin a saŇčan, idaw ku dajdaj nu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan. makak…ônińß tu nijadu Ē~ °, kakakur~…ĺian, sasasiwbajan, a…ôn…ôŇčan nu tapaŇč, kakakur~…ĺian tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj, r~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺaŇčdawan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nikak…ônińßan. kakur~…ĺian nu sińßu timur~…ĺan u sakaj nutawan nu kanatar~…ĺan a kitidaan, nutipan u ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶an a dadan, t…ôpar~…ĺ ńßan u kapur~…ĺuŇčan a sakakawawan, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku giŇčku, pańßusuaj, pańßusuaj tu tir~…ĺibi, dansinkiwk. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô u kas…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôdan ¶a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu d…ômiadan " ¶wa".i …ôn…ômaj nu bur~…ĺadan ku sa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj, ńßu ¶unu d…ômiadan makaar~…ĺa tu *** ¶ (***.**f).kas…ôŇč…ôtan nu d…ômiad i pituaj a bur~…ĺad, tabaki ku nikańß…ôtik nu udad, r~…ĺabii ńßan idaw ku k…ôr~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇčan a nikaudadan, ńßakija idaw ku bar~…ĺat atu tabaki nu udadan. sasapi Ē~ °aj nu udadan i ¶a ¶ajaj nu bur~…ĺad.
S.FORM: == Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de šľäśĖĮŤė≠ÁĎ™Ś∑īŚĺ∑ == Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de "W-e-du kamu:ōßō≥ŔĄōßŔÖ ōĘō®ōßōĮ‚Äé, sumad han:IslńĀm ńÄbńĀd‚Äé", u Pa-ci-se-tan a tukay, kitidaan nu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de a tukayan. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de itida i Pa-ci-se-tan wali amis a Puo-te'-wa-buyu'an, talakaw limsipsep kun-ce, u kalasengesengetan ku caledes nu demiadan. itini i likisi, ina kitidaan u sakatayda i Pan-pu atu Kay-puo-e-pu-se-tu a sacumud nu ziwziluan, ina Ma-ke-la sacumud u sakatayda tu tusaay a kitidaan nu cacumudan. :ōßō≥ŔĄōßŔÖ ōĘō®ōßōĮ‚Äé,ŤĹČŚĮę:IslńĀm ńÄbńĀd‚Äé) . Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de nikayzuan itida i caysiwnemsep mihcaan, miliyun tun aw tukay nu Ke'-la-ce. aydaay nu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de nu malisimetay a kanatalan, saan u Pa-ci-se-tan samalahatay a kanatal, masausiay nu Gamma+ a kanatalan nu tukay. nika namaka tucay a secian, Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de kinapina debungan nu makatalay a tademaw. itini i tusepseppic mihcaan enem a bulad tusa a demiadan a Dan-may muenengay i Pa-ci-se-tan ta-se-kun mabakuhac atu nuydaan a mihcaan tu siwa a bulad tusa a bataan a demiadan a Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de a hutiluan mabakuhac. Gamma . Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de itida i tusepcaycay mihcaan idaw ku tusa a lasubu a wang nu tademawan, atu mitepalay a tukay u La-wa-e-pin pulungen nu heni ku tademaw malakuuyt ku siplimsep a wang nu tademawan, mala sakatulu nu kanatal a tukayan nu tademawan. nu nikapatidengan tina tukayan idaw tu ku namaka cuwacuwaay a tademawan, ina Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de mala Pa-ci-se-tan itini i kitakidan atu talakaway nu tukayan a tukayan. malakitakid nu tukay, Pa-ci-se-tan sihu, Pa-ci-se-tan-cuntung hu ci "Aiwan-e-Sadr" itida a mueneng. Pa-ci-se-tan kakiningan tu paya itida tu. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de u sayadahay nu sakayhekal nu tahudan, tapang atu mikuliay i siehu a lalitemuhan nu kitidaan. (Aiwan-e-Sadr) . Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de a tukay mibuwahay nu wi-yen-huy "CDA" misuayaw tu tukay ni patidengan tu mamikuwan a tademaw. Nan-ya satabakiay a Cin-cen-biyu, sakasepat nu satabakiay nu kitakidan a Cin-cen-se Fea-sa-e-Cin-cen-se itida ku nipatideng i Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de idaw ku tabakiay nu cacudadan sabaw enem ku palutatengaan. pasu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de nu kaygung tabakiay a cacudadan "AU", Cen-na tabakiay a cacudadan "QAU" atu Pa-ci-se-tan kuo-li-ke-ci-tabakiay a cacudadan "NUST", duma u A-la-ma.Yi-ke'-e-kay-fan tabakiay a cacudadan "ALOU" sipakayda nu namiccudaday a tademaw u sakasepat nu kitakidan a tabakiay nu cacudadan. (CDA) (AU),ÁúüÁīćŚ§ßŚ≠ł(QAU) (NUST),ŚÖ∂šł≠ťėŅśčČÁĎ™¬∑šľäŚÖčŚ∑īÁąĺťĖčśĒĺŚ§ßŚ≠ł(AIOU) . tapang nu cudad Ť©ěśļź "Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de" ""Islamabad"" cacay nu sasulitan namaka "Islam" atu "abad", imi u Yi-se-lan a tukay. "Islam" u A-la-puo kamu masacacayay han u Yi-se-lan-cyaw nu kiwkayan, "-abad" namaka Puo-se-kamu tu niyadu' a pinganganan, imi u "sitademaway nu aenengan a kitidaan" hatu "tukay". "šľäśĖĮŤė≠ÁĎ™Ś∑īŚĺ∑"("Islamabad")šłÄŤ©ěšĺÜŤá™"Islam"ŚíĆ"abad",ŚÖ∂śĄŹÁāļ"šľäśĖĮŤė≠ÁöĄŚüéŚłā"."Islam" ,"-abad" ". Likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de tukay atu Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de aenengan i Puo-te'-wa-e pabaw nu buyu'an a nu liwan a kitidaaan saan u Ya-cuo sayaway a Tadema nu liwan a kitidaan. itida i buyu'an maadih ku nu sumamaday nu ba'tuan a liwan nu kitidaan taneng talaayaw mikilim tu lima a bataan nu wang a mihcaan, itida i Suo-an-sawacan makatepa tu liwan nu kitidaan u namaka pin-ci a naayaway nu tademaw anipisaculiculilan ni patahekalan tu sasasiwmian. Pa-ci-se-tan caysiwsippic mihcaan a patideng tina kanatalan, tukay itida i lalabu nu kanatal nu timulan a minatu nu tukay Ke'-la-ce. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de yadah ku mahiniay sakay tukay a nipatidengan tu mahiniay. nu ayawan a cuntun nu Pa-ci-se-tan ci A-yiw-pu.Han mangalay misakapah tu nikaudip, nika dayday nu Pa-ci-se-tan sakay sakaudip itida milingling tu Ke-la-ce nu nikudanay a binacadan nu kakitidaan. kacaledesan tawya ku Ke'-la-ce, sakatimul tu micapi tu A-la-puo bayuan, sakay hitayan caay kaw matatungusa. misuayaw tu Pa-ci-se-tan kapah patideng tu niyaniyadu'an tu sakalalitemuhan a tukayan. sisa kinapina misimsim ku syahu tu sapilimadaw katukuh i caysiwlimsiw mihcaan tusa a bulad kya mapatideng i Puo-te'-wa-e buyuan patideng i wali amis a kitidaan nu La-wa-e-pin-ti. pangangan han "Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de". ". caysiwpicsep mihcaan kakitidaan nu lalaan makaala tu siwseppic pin-fan-kun-li, aydaay namin a sangan, idaw ku dayday nu Yi-se-lan. makakenih tu niyadu', kakakulian, sasasiwbayan, aenengan nu tapang, kakakulian tu ba'ketay, langlangdawan nu kilakilangan nikakenihan. kakulian nu sihu timulan u sakay nutawan nu kanatalan a kitidaan, nutipan u ahebalay nu hulican a dadan, tepal han u kapulungan a sakakawawan, ilabu idaw ku gingku, pahusuay, pahusuay tu tilibi, dansinkiwk. Yi-se-lan-ma-pa-de u kasengesengedan cacaledesan nu demiadan "Cwa".i enemay nu buladan ku sacaledesay, hucunu demiadan makaala tu 38ÔĺüC (100.4ÔĺüF).kasengetan nu demiad i pituay a bulad, tabaki ku nikahetik nu udad, labii han idaw ku kelekelengan a nikaudadan, hakiya idaw ku balat atu tabaki nu udadan. sasapi'ay nu udadan i cacayay nu bulad.

(aiwan-…ô-sadr) . ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô a tukaj mibuwańßaj nu wi-j…ôn-ńßuj " ¶da" misuajaw tu tukaj ni patid…ôŇčan tu mamikuwan a tad…ômaw. nan-ja satabakiaj a ¶in- ¶…ôn-biju, sakas…ôpat nu satabakiaj nu kitakidan a ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô f…ôa-sa-…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô itida ku nipatid…ôŇč i ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô idaw ku tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan sabaw …ôn…ôm ku par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan. pasu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô nu kajguŇč tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "au", ¶…ôn-na tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "*au" atu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan kuo-r~…ĺi-k…ô- ¶i-tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "nust", duma u a-r~…ĺa-ma.ji-k…ô Ē~ °-…ô-kaj-fan tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan "ar~…ĺou" sipakajda nu nami ¶ ¶udadaj a tad…ômaw u sakas…ôpat nu kitakidan a tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan. ( ¶da) (au),****(*au) (nust),**************(aiou) . tapaŇč nu ¶udad ** "ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô" ""isr~…ĺamabad"" ¶a ¶aj nu sasur~…ĺitan namaka "isr~…ĺam" atu "abad", imi u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan a tukaj. "******"("isr~…ĺamabad")****"isr~…ĺam"*"abad",***"******"."isr~…ĺam" ,"-abad" ". r~…ĺikisi ** ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô tukaj atu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô a…ôn…ôŇčan i puo-t…ô Ē~ °-wa-…ô pabaw nu buju Ē~ °an a nu r~…ĺiwan a kitidaaan saan u ja- ¶uo sajawaj a tad…ôma nu r~…ĺiwan a kitidaan. itida i buju Ē~ °an maadińß ku nu sumamadaj nu ba Ē~ °tuan a r~…ĺiwan nu kitidaan tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺaajaw mikir~…ĺim tu r~…ĺima a bataan nu waŇč a mińß ¶aan, itida i suo-an-sawa ¶an makat…ôpa tu r~…ĺiwan nu kitidaan u namaka pin- ¶i a naajawaj nu tad…ômaw anipisa ¶ur~…ĺi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan ni patańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sasasiwmian. pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan a patid…ôŇč tina kanatar~…ĺan, tukaj itida i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ nu timur~…ĺan a minatu nu tukaj k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô jadańß ku mańßiniaj sakaj tukaj a nipatid…ôŇčan tu mańßiniaj. nu ajawan a ¶untun nu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan ¶i a-jiw-pu.ńßan maŇčar~…ĺaj misakapańß tu nikaudip, nika dajdaj nu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan sakaj sakaudip itida mir~…ĺiŇčr~…ĺiŇč tu k…ô-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô nu nikudanaj a bina ¶adan nu kakitidaan. ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan tawja ku k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô, sakatimur~…ĺ tu mi ¶api tu a-r~…ĺa-puo bajuan, sakaj ńßitajan ¶aaj kaw matatuŇčusa. misuajaw tu pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan kapańß patid…ôŇč tu nijanijadu Ē~ °an tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a tukajan. sisa kinapina misimsim ku sjańßu tu sapir~…ĺimadaw katukuńß i ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimsiw mińß ¶aan tusa a bur~…ĺad kja mapatid…ôŇč i puo-t…ô Ē~ °-wa-…ô bujuan patid…ôŇč i war~…ĺi amis a kitidaan nu r~…ĺa-wa-…ô-pin-ti. paŇčaŇčan ńßan "ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô". ". ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan kakitidaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan makaar~…ĺa tu siws…ôppi ¶ pin-fan-kun-r~…ĺi, ajdaaj namin a saŇčan, idaw ku dajdaj nu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan. makak…ônińß tu nijadu Ē~ °, kakakur~…ĺian, sasasiwbajan, a…ôn…ôŇčan nu tapaŇč, kakakur~…ĺian tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj, r~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺaŇčdawan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nikak…ônińßan. kakur~…ĺian nu sińßu timur~…ĺan u sakaj nutawan nu kanatar~…ĺan a kitidaan, nutipan u ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶an a dadan, t…ôpar~…ĺ ńßan u kapur~…ĺuŇčan a sakakawawan, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku giŇčku, pańßusuaj, pańßusuaj tu tir~…ĺibi, dansinkiwk. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-pa-d…ô u kas…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôdan ¶a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu d…ômiadan " ¶wa".i …ôn…ômaj nu bur~…ĺadan ku sa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj, ńßu ¶unu d…ômiadan makaar~…ĺa tu *** ¶ (***.**f).kas…ôŇč…ôtan nu d…ômiad i pituaj a bur~…ĺad, tabaki ku nikańß…ôtik nu udad, r~…ĺabii ńßan idaw ku k…ôr~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇčan a nikaudadan, ńßakija idaw ku bar~…ĺat atu tabaki nu udadan. sasapi Ē~ °aj nu udadan i ¶a ¶ajaj nu bur~…ĺad.
